steps.title: Write both relationships
steps.content:
Translate each percentage statement into an equation.
$$a=2.75b$$
$$a=0.80c$$

steps.title: Solve for c in terms of b
steps.content:
Both expressions equal $a$, so set them equal and isolate $c$.
$$2.75b=0.80c$$
$$c=\frac{2.75}{0.80}b$$
$$c=3.4375b$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: If $c=3.4375b$, then $c$ is $343.75\%$ of $b$. The closest listed value of $p$ is $344$. The answer is D.
